productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Arizona Red Flip Flop
description: A stroll on the beach or a lazy day at home - slip into these colorful Arizona flip-flops from puma to make your day just perfect.Upper Rubber upper for smooth comfort of the feet Thong straps to hold the foot in place, and add comfort and style 3D logo embossed on the straps for style Midsole Soft, cushioned footbed for step-in comfort puma cat logo on the footbed Outsole TPR outsole with round suction points all over for grip and traction shoe careWipe surface with soft, clean, damp clothDo not machine wash
